text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Haru Urara has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One, two...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I finished my run! What's next?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okey-dokey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, Haru Urara has been working even
harder than before. I wonder if there's something I
can do to repay her efforts...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I want a treat! Take me to the hot springs as a
treat someday!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oh, I remember now!
choice_data_list: Hey, how about a trip to the hot springs, Urara?
Hey, how about a trip to the hot springs, Urara?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really?! Let's go, let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But why there?
choice_data_list: You won a trip in the raffle, remember?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? In the raffle? When was that, again?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I don't really remember, but yay! I get to go to the hot springs!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hot springs! Hot springs! Urara, la la la!♪
choice_data_list:
So which one of your friends do you want to
invite?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I wanna go with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before I even know what's happening...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew! ♪ The water felt amazing, huh, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Were you able to relax? Do you feel refreshed?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Yeah, you look it! You must have put your
whole body in!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's hang out in your room next!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you a massage! My family says I give the
best massages!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You're always working so hard, Trainer! I'm sure
your shoulders could use a little relief.
choice_data_list: I'd love that, but... why are you doing this?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Today's a treat for the both of us!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Because if I'm working hard, that means
you are too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So let's treat each other today!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you a massage, and while we're at it, let's
have fun chatting!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And... heh...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Your smile will be my treat!
choice_data_list: Thank you, Urara. That's really sweet.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I hope you like your treat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After that, we both relax and enjoy our treats.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Haru Urara and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
